## 1. Role Justification

The Art Director owns the visual identity of the casual game from Stage 0 (Art Direction) through Stage 5 (Full Production). This is a P0 hire because without a defined visual direction, the Creative Director cannot approve Stage 0 deliverables, and the art team (Technical Artist, 3D Artists, VFX Artist, UI Visual Artist) cannot begin production. The Art Director establishes the art style guide, visual pillars, and art production pipeline that all downstream art hires will execute against.

**Pipeline Stages Owned:** 0, 1, 2, 3, 5

# Position Specification Document

**Role:** Art Director (G4)
**Role Family:** Art / Creative
**Seniority:** Principal (L3)
**Team:** Casual Games Studio — Art Division
**Reports To:** Creative Director (Sakura Ishimori)
**Priority:** P0
**Compensation Band:** $140K–$190K base
**Document ID:** PSD-2026-G4-001
**Generated:** 2026-04-10T08:00:00Z
**Generated By:** CHRO Office (Automated Pipeline)

---

## 1. Role Justification

The Art Director owns the visual identity of the casual game from Stage 0 (Art Direction) through Stage 5 (Full Production). This is a P0 hire because without a defined visual direction, the Creative Director cannot approve Stage 0 deliverables, and the art team (Technical Artist, 3D Artists, VFX Artist, UI Visual Artist) cannot begin production. The Art Director establishes the art style guide, visual pillars, and art production pipeline that all downstream art hires will execute against.

**Pipeline Stages Owned:** 0, 1, 2, 3, 5

---

## 2. Required Competencies (weighted)

| Competency                        | Weight | Minimum Threshold | Assessment Method                       |
| --------------------------------- | ------ | ----------------- | --------------------------------------- |
| Game Art Direction                | 25%    | ≥ 4/5             | Portfolio review + panel interview      |
| Mobile Art Pipeline Optimization  | 20%    | ≥ 4/5             | Technical case study                    |
| Art Team Leadership (5+ direct)   | 15%    | ≥ 4/5             | Behavioral interview + reference checks |
| Shipped Title Track Record (2+)   | 15%    | ≥ 4/5             | Employment verification + portfolio     |
| Cross-Disciplinary Collaboration  | 10%    | ≥ 3/5             | Panel interview                         |
| Visual Systems Thinking           | 10%    | ≥ 3/5             | Design challenge                        |
| Production Readiness & Scheduling | 5%     | ≥ 3/5             | Case study                              |

---

## 3. Must-Have Qualifications

- 8+ years game art production experience
- 2+ shipped mobile game titles as Art Director or equivalent
- Art pipeline knowledge (DCC tools, asset optimization, texture compression)
- Team leadership experience managing 5+ direct reports
- Mobile art optimization expertise (polycount budgets, draw call management, LOD systems)

---

## 4. Compensation Structure

| Component         | Range / Value                                      |
| ----------------- | -------------------------------------------------- |
| Base Salary       | $140K–$190K (positioned at 75th percentile: $165K) |
| Performance Bonus | Up to 15% of base                                  |
| Equity            | 0.15%–0.25% (Principal tier)                       |
| Signing Bonus     | Up to $25K (if leaving unvested equity)            |
| Relocation        | Up to $15K                                         |
| Conference Budget | $5K/year                                           |

---

## 5. Sourcing Channels (prioritized)

| Channel                        | Priority | Quality Weight |
| ------------------------------ | -------- | -------------- |
| Supercell, King, Zynga alumni  | 1        | 1.5×           |
| GDC Art Track speakers         | 2        | 1.3×           |
| ArtStation featured artists    | 3        | 1.2×           |
| Referrals from Sakura Ishimori | 4        | 1.5×           |
| LinkedIn passive sourcing      | 5        | 1.0×           |

---

## 6. Assessment Battery

| Assessment                     | Format                      | Duration | Weight |
| ------------------------------ | --------------------------- | -------- | ------ |
| Portfolio Review               | Automated rubric scoring    | Async    | 25%    |
| Art Direction Case Study       | Visual style guide creation | 48h      | 25%    |
| Simulated Panel Interview      | AI panel, signal questions  | 45 min   | 30%    |
| Behavioral / Culture Add       | STAR method                 | 30 min   | 15%    |
| Technical Deep-Dive (Pipeline) | Art pipeline optimization   | 30 min   | 5%     |

---

## 7. Success Criteria

| Milestone   | Criteria                                                                                           |
| ----------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **Day 1**   | Art pipeline tools installed, asset library access granted, first mood board review complete       |
| **Week 1**  | Initial visual pillars document drafted; paired with Creative Director on Stage 0 deliverables     |
| **Month 1** | Complete art style guide approved by Creative Director; art production pipeline defined            |
| **Month 3** | Art team fully ramped; first production assets passing quality bar; Stage 0 art direction complete |

---
